pair.value: Employee completes comprehensive leave request form with leave type, dates, reason, and optional documentation. The system validates the request against available balance, calculates working days excluding weekends and holidays, creates approval task for manager, and sends confirmation notification to employee that request was received and is pending manager approval.
Process begins when employee initiates leave request submission
Employee completes comprehensive leave request form with leave type, dates, reason, and optional documentation
Decision point to determine if user cancelled out of the form before submitting
Calculate Working Days and Validate Balance
Calculate Working Days and Validate Balance
System calculates working days excluding weekends and holidays, validates request against available balance, and sets request status to pending
Saves leave request details to the database with pending status
Prepares confirmation email content with request details and approval timeline
Sends confirmation notification to employee that request was received and is pending manager approval
Automatically creates approval task for employee's manager to review the leave request
Process completes with leave request successfully submitted or cancelled

annotation.text: To-Do: Create an interface which allows the employee to fill out leave request form fields including leave type dropdown, start/end date pickers, reason text area, and file upload for documentation. The interface should have submit and cancel buttons. Update this user input task node to point to the generated interface.

To-Do: Implement logic to calculate working days between start and end dates excluding weekends and public holidays. Validate that employee has sufficient balance for the requested leave type. Set request status to 'Pending' and prepare data for database write.
To-Do: Create expression rule to draft confirmation email including leave type, dates, working days, request ID, and expected approval timeline.
To-Do: Implement logic to identify employee's manager and create approval task with leave request details, employee balance information, and team calendar context.
